title: Epic: Rust dot-yml equivalent crate and publish to crates.io
description: Implement Rust equivalent of Python dot-yml loader (YAML to env conventions), integrate with Taskulus Rust, and publish the crate to crates.io for reuse.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Abandoned dotyaml crate approach; moving to single .taskulus.yml config file strategy.
custom.beads_notes:
Scope: replicate Python dot-yml env-loading semantics in Rust, package as crate, publish to crates.io; provide docs and use in Taskulus Rust. This epic blocks config standardization (tskl-oju).
Created child tasks: tskl-9nu.1 (API design), tskl-9nu.2 (implementation), tskl-9nu.3 (publish crate). Token will be requested at publish time; not stored.
